summary: Verified all /mira-demo tidy-up changes: 1) No duplicate Soul Orb (only 1 in MiraTopBar), 2) Header is position:relative (scrolls with content), 3) Soul Form Modal shows dynamic questions, 4) Pet photo shows in Soul Orb, 5) Switch Pet dropdown works with 7 pets, 6) New Chat creates new session, 7) Reminders and Concierge dropdowns work. Fixed bug in SoulFormModal.jsx (QUICK_SOUL_QUESTIONS.length → unansweredQuestions.length).
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: SoulFormModal.jsx line 402 referenced undefined QUICK_SOUL_QUESTIONS.length - changed to unansweredQuestions.length
context_for_next_testing_agent: All /mira-demo tidy-up changes verified working. The page occasionally crashes when navigating directly - works reliably when going through login flow first.

tested_flows.notes: Successfully logged in with test credentials and navigated to /mira-demo
Soul orb count: 1 (only in MiraTopBar, removed from WelcomeHero)

tested_flows.flow: Verify header scrolls with content (not sticky)
Click Soul button - verify dynamic questions
tested_flows.notes: Soul Form Modal opens with 'Know Mojo Better', shows Question 1 of 3 from dynamic pool

tested_flows.flow: Verify pet photo in Soul Orb

tested_flows.notes: Dropdown shows 7 pets: Mojo, Lola, Mystique, Bruno, Luna, Buddy, Meister. Switching to Lola loads her conversation history.

tested_flows.flow: New Chat button creates new session
tested_flows.notes: Console: [SESSION] Started new session: mira-xxx for pet: Mojo
Shows 'Mira's Reminders' with 3 urgent items: Rabies overdue, Grooming overdue, Birthday in 3 days, Weekly check
Shows 'Concierge® Help' with WhatsApp, Chat, and Email options
All buttons meet 44px minimum tap target. Soul orb count: 1 on mobile.
